title: investigate: nightly ETL job failing intermittently
reproduced failure on staging
body: Triggered on every run with batch size >2.4M. Connection reset from the upstream warehouse.

title: still working: tracing the reset
body: Correlating the reset with warehouse query duration.

title: root cause identified: warehouse query timeout
body: Query hits a 5-min server-side limit when the partition exceeds 2.4M rows. Needs a warehouse-side config change.

title: warehouse config change requires the data-platform team
body: Need the data-platform team to raise statement_timeout for the analytics role. Filed MERI-2207; expected response 2-3 business days. Closing this arc as terminal-blocked; will open a new arc when MERI-2207 lands.
